stemHtml: An aeroplane, with its CG limits from 638 inches to 658 inches aft of the datum, should have been loaded so as to give a calculated Take-Off Mass of 64 200 kg and the CG located at 640 inches aft of the datum, with 750 kg loaded into the front cargo hold and 500 kg into the rear cargo hold. Unfortunately, the ground staff incorrectly loaded all the cargo into the forward cargo hold. If the distance between the cargo holds is 517 inches, is the aeroplane's CG within limits?

options.a: No, it is out of the rear limit.
options.b: No, it is out of the forward limit.
options.d: Yes, it moves rearwards but is within limits.
